summary.goal: Chain dev success into release/main-promote and then into main when promotion validation passes
changes: Promotion workflow now enables auto-merge on the release/main-promote to main PR
Release-flow documentation updated to describe the chained promotion path
intentional_non_changes: No direct dev to main pushes
No CI Dev or CI Main Runtime test logic changes

risks: Repository-level GitHub auto-merge may need to be enabled
Branch protection may still block merge until all required rules are satisfied
recommendation: Observe the next successful dev run and confirm that the promotion PR is auto-merge-enabled and proceeds into main after required checks pass.
